description: D2 planted case: counterparty inserts required minimum coverage levels exceeding Exos's standard program. Must fire no-excess-insurance-levels and result in REQUEST_CHANGE. Verifies the narrowed rule still catches genuine violations.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Exos shall maintain commercial general liability insurance with minimum coverage of Five Million Dollars ($5,000,000) per occurrence, and all coverage levels must be evidenced by certificates of insurance naming Institution as a certificate holder.
planted_variation.notes: Specific minimum coverage and coverage levels requirements exceeding Exos's standard program. Must fire no-excess-insurance-levels on 'minimum coverage' and 'coverage levels'.

detector_expectation.rationale: Inserted minimum-coverage and coverage-levels requirements fire the narrowed no-excess-insurance-levels rule. The removed 'additional insured' trigger does not affect this case.
